name: CHEASY

postCreateCommand.backend: cd backend && python -m pip install --user pipenv && python -m pipenv sync

postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; for url in http://127.0.0.1:3001/ http://127.0.0.1:3000/; do for attempt in $(seq 1 120); do if curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null 2>&1; then break; fi; if [ "$attempt" -eq 120 ]; then exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done; done; if [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ] && [ -n "$GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN" ]; then "$BROWSER" "https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3001.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; "$BROWSER" "https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ ! -f .env ] && [ -f .env.example ]; then cp .env.example .env; fi; if command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ]; then gh codespace ports visibility -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" 3000:public 3001:public >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! ss -ltn | grep -q ":3001\b"; then (cd backend && nohup python -m pipenv run python app.py >/tmp/cheasy-backend.log 2>&1 &); fi; if ! ss -ltn | grep -q ":3000\b"; then (cd frontend && nohup npm start >/tmp/cheasy-frontend.log 2>&1 &); fi'
